_meta.title: a2ui-chat: the conversational agent surface (TKT-0020) — BUILD plan: SurfaceRegistry, chat-log page, line router, narration driver, wire disclosure, live overlay. Design intake output only; build dispatched separately.
_meta.author: design intake (no component-design skill — a site-page teaching+demo composition)
_meta.grounding: SPEC a2ui-chat.spec.md SPEC-R1..R8, no proposed ADR (LLD §9 rationale). Mechanics verified directly: renderer/renderer.ts's RendererHost.mount(rootEl)/#attachRoot (one mount per host, forces the per-surface registry) and finalize(surfaceId?) overload; site/lib/ask-registry.ts's AskRegistry/surfaceIdOf/componentTypesOf (the generalized precedent); transcript.ts's shipped 5-turn recordedTranscript (reused verbatim, SPEC-N4); a2ui-live.ts's summarize()/wireLiveOverlay()/readMetaLine (reused techniques); status-stream.ts/status-stream-demo.ts (the narration host + pacing precedent); a2a-artifact-feed.ts's disclosure()/wireFeedLiveOverlay() (the wire-disclosure + second live-overlay-copy precedent).
_meta.note: OUTSIDE-IN nodes = the files/surfaces a build slice touches (registry/page/router/narration/disclosure/live/nav). INSIDE-OUT actions = what the built surface must DO once shipped. plan:true - no build source exists yet; this decomp is dispatched to a build seat after this intake's doc review.

nodes.label: SurfaceEntry/SurfaceRegistry class authored (site/lib/surface-registry.ts)
nodes.accept: create()/get()/has()/close()/disposeAll()/size implemented exactly per LLD-C2's frozen interface; create() throws on an already-known surfaceId; close() disposes exactly that surface's host and is idempotent (false) on an unknown/already-closed id

nodes.label: surface-registry.test.ts
nodes.accept: npm test surface-registry — green: create/get/has/close/disposeAll contract incl. close() disposing exactly one host + annotating exactly one bubble, create() throw-on-duplicate (LLD-C2)

nodes.label: site/pages/a2ui-chat.ts + a2ui-chat.html + a2ui-chat.css authored — single scrolling log, user/agent bubbles, composer, reset, wired to the RECORDED transport
nodes.accept: the page renders one scrolling chat log (no split chat+canvas pane); a user turn appends a prose bubble; an agent turn appends its own bubble; composer + reset wired to createRecordedTransport() (SPEC-R1, SPEC-R2)

nodes.label: routeLine wired into the page — fresh-surface vs known-surface vs delete dispatch, reusing surfaceIdOf/componentTypesOf
nodes.accept: a fresh createSurface line opens a NEW mount in the current turn's bubble and registers it; a line targeting a KNOWN surfaceId routes to that surface's ORIGINAL bubble's host, never the current turn's; a deleteSurface line calls registry.close() on the target (SPEC-R3 AC1/AC2, SPEC-R4 AC1)

nodes.label: a2ui-chat.test.ts (jsdom) — routing proof against the shipped 5-turn transcript
nodes.accept: npm test a2ui-chat — turn 3/4 (updateComponents/updateDataModel on confirmation) route into turn 2's EXISTING mount with no new bubble; turn 5 (deleteSurface confirmation) closes turn 2's mount + annotates it, leaving turn 1's canvas bubble untouched (SPEC-R3 AC1/AC2, SPEC-R4 AC1)

nodes.label: categoryOf/LABEL + narrate() implemented — per-turn ui-status-stream entries, category-deduplicated, paced
nodes.accept: each agent turn appends a narration ui-status-stream; one entry per DISTINCT message-type category the turn's lines touch (open/restructure/react/close), transitioning pending->active->done; finalize() called exactly once per turn even when the transport throws (SPEC-R5 AC1, AC3)

nodes.label: TurnTrace enrichment — one additional entry when meta.trace is present (live arm only)
nodes.accept: given a turn whose meta-line carries a TurnTrace, the narration appends one further entry stating exemplarIds/rounds/healed/model verbatim, with no re-derived or invented text (SPEC-R5 AC2)

nodes.label: a2ui-chat.test.ts narration-honesty assertions
nodes.accept: npm test a2ui-chat — recorded-turn narration text is drawn ONLY from the LABEL table (a literal-text assertion), never a free-form sentence (SPEC-R5 AC1, SPEC-N5)

nodes.label: per-bubble <details> wire disclosure (the a2a-artifact-feed.ts disclosure() idiom, copied)
nodes.accept: every bubble carries a collapsed disclosure that opens to the real JSON of every line that turn's transport emitted (SPEC-R7 AC1)

nodes.label: site/main.ts nav row + site/a2ui-chat.html MPA entry
nodes.accept: a new nav row (the a2ui-live row's neighbor) links to ./a2ui-chat.html; vite.config.ts's site/**/*.html glob auto-discovers the new MPA entry with no config edit (the a2ui-live precedent)

nodes.label: wireLiveOverlay() ported from a2ui-live.ts — dev-only dynamic import, switcher, tree-shaken
nodes.accept: under import.meta.env.DEV with a live key available, the switcher mounts and a live transport replaces the recorded one; the static vite build's output contains no live-proxy-transport reference (a grep/tree-shake assertion, the a2ui-live/a2a-artifact-feed sibling precedent, SPEC-R8 AC1)

nodes.label: Cross-engine browser proof (LLD-C8)
nodes.accept: a2ui-chat.browser.test.ts green on Chromium+WebKit: the full open->narrate->render->update->delete arc plays; BOTH the outer log's and an embedded ui-status-stream's tail-follow behave independently (SPEC-R6 AC1); the wire disclosure opens to real JSON (SPEC-R7 AC1)

nodes.label: Manual live-arm verification
nodes.justify: human-observed, not gate-covered — no live key required for any other node's gate
nodes.accept: a manual npm run dev walk with a live provider key confirms a live turn's narration surfaces real TurnTrace fields (exemplarIds/rounds/healed/model) per n11's mechanism (SPEC-R5 AC2)

actions.label: build the reusable per-surface host/mount/bubble lifecycle
prove the lifecycle's create/get/has/close/disposeAll contract in isolation
stand up the single-scroll-log chat page against the recorded transport
route every ingested line to the correct surface's own bubble, never a new one for a known id
prove the routing rule against the real shipped 5-turn lifecycle arc
narrate each turn's mechanical message-type category live, deduplicated and paced
enrich narration with real retrieval/self-correct facts when a live trace is present
prove narration never states an unverified fact
disclose every turn's real wire JSON
wire the page into site navigation and the build's MPA glob
reuse the existing dev-only live overlay wiring, unmodified in shape
prove the whole shape cross-engine: narrate/render/update/delete + both scroll regions + the wire disclosure
confirm live-arm narration enrichment by hand, once, against a real model

edges.why: the unit test proves the class this node builds
the router dispatches through the registry's create/get/has/close surface
the router is wired into the page shell this node stands up
the jsdom test proves the routing rule this node implements
narration composes on top of a proven-correct routing/turn boundary
trace enrichment is an additional entry appended by the SAME narration function
the honesty assertion proves the narration function this node builds
disclosure is wired per-bubble, once bubbles/mounts exist correctly
the nav/MPA entry points at the page this node stands up
the live overlay swaps the SAME transport seam the recorded page shell already wires
the cross-engine proof exercises the SAME arc n8 already proves in jsdom, in real engines
the cross-engine proof also exercises the wire disclosure this node adds
the manual live walk needs the live overlay wiring this node lands
the manual live walk confirms the trace-enrichment mechanism this node builds, against a real model
